arest.description: AREST engine — FORML2 readings → REST API. Tools: apply / compile / propose / query / audit / verify, plus a built-in sandboxed tutor (tutor + tutor.* tools) that runs orthogonal to your active app.

arest-remote.description: AREST engine (remote worker mode). Requires AREST_URL and AREST_API_KEY set in your shell.
